title: Surgeon Vacancy at BLK-Max Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at BLK-Max Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BLK-Max Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About BLK-Max Hospital:
BLK-Max Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital!
